releaseNotes:
• Critical fix: restores all app network requests over HTTPS. A change in 3.0.8 broke secure connections, so update checks, provider login/refresh, EPG guide downloads, and playlist imports were failing silently on 3.0.8–3.0.9. They work again.
• The DNS-over-HTTPS resolver added in 3.0.8 is temporarily disabled while it is reworked (it was the cause of the HTTPS breakage). Your other network features are unaffected.
